title: FACEBOOK — early-COVID stock thesis, future-of-work futurism, and a Mrs. Ransom dream
html:
FACEBOOK — early-COVID stock thesis, future-of-work futurism, and a Mrs. Ransom dream

Source: 2020-03-30 Apple Note (titled "FACEBOOK" though the content is a kitchen-sink late-March pandemic brain-dump). 17-year-old Yahir doing balance-sheet research on COVID-impacted stocks, mapping Orwellian post-pandemic futures, drafting a check-in to Travis, queuing chores, and closing on a dream about being trolled by neighbor Mrs. Ransom. Classic mode.

TL;DR

  • Yahir builds a balance-sheet watchlist of COVID-battered names — Carnival Corp, Live Nation, Emerson Electric, Beyond Meat, Hertz, Zoom Video — alongside a gold-vs-stocks bias hedge and a recruitment-stocks angle (BG Staffing, KForce, Staffing 360, Paychex).
  • Drafts an unsent message to Travis (then Dutch Bros founder) doing the "hope all is well" check-in during "these uncertain times" — first capture of Yahir's mentor-from-afar outreach pattern.
  • Forecasts the post COVID future: mass move from brick-and-mortar to digital, generational pivot toward trusting science, Orwellian surveillance via contact tracing, and China's tracking-app posture — a remarkably accurate 17-year-old's read.
  • Closes the note logging an FBA + eBay-reselling + candy-machine + SAT + FBLA to-do block plus a "FOR DAD LOAN" SBA-EIDL paperwork checklist (personal financial statement, tax-return transcript request) — Yahir as household financial liaison.
  • Ends with a vivid dream where neighbor "Mrs. Ransom" steals his car, he counter-takes their razor scooter as collateral, and the husband (Elliot's adjacent) starts seeing the bullshit.

Recurring patterns

  • The "BE HUMBLE / FINDING THE RIGHT PEOPLE / TRIBAL THINKING" block — Yahir already articulating tribe-and-trust framing during the pandemic shock. Connects to later frequency as belonging and work.
  • "Quibi?" appears as a one-word what-do-I-think-of-this checkpoint — fits the quibi entity's fate.

Open questions

  • Did Yahir actually pull the trigger on any of the watchlist names? Carnival was the most contrarian.
  • Was the "Wild River" job ever applied for?

Related

  • covid pandemic era
  • surveillance state
  • post pandemic future thinking
  • fbla
